ctas.notes: Low-friction social CTA — good on Instagram and Facebook.
Strong intent signal. Best for LinkedIn and Google Business.

ctas.cta: Visit mixedmakershop.com to see what we do
ctas.notes: Drives traffic to the site. Use when the post has space.

ctas.cta: Reply to this post and we'll get back to you the same day
ctas.notes: Boosts platform algorithm signals via replies.

ctas.cta: Share this with a small business owner who could use the help
ctas.notes: Good occasional change-up. Works best on educational posts.
